text: What is NAT? @ essencocia. © s e Network Address Translation (NAT) e A set of processes - remapping SRC or DST IPs * IP masquerading - hiding CIDR Blocks behind one IP e Public IPv4 Addresses running out * Gives Private CIDR range outgoing internet* access
